name: poker-icm-app
description: 日本語UIの店舗トナメ向け ICM/BF/Nash 計算アプリ（モバイルWeb）

scripts.build: npm -w @poker-icm/core run build && npm -w @poker-icm/playground run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @poker-icm/core run typecheck && npm -w @poker-icm/playground exec -- tsc --noEmit
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && cap sync ios
